creator: quakelee@geekcn.org
text:
I approved. But I think a new pr maybe better. :)
Thank you for your pr.

Regards,

> On Sat, Mar 10, 2007 at 00:22:47 +0800, Li-Wen Hsu wrote:
>> Excuse me, please close this PR, ll-core 1.7.5 is out.
>
> Well, let's save PR numbers, since it's not a big change.
> Dear maintainer, please check this patch:
>
> =3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=
=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D=3D
> diff -ruN -ruN --exclude=3DCVS /usr/ports/devel/py-ll-core/Makefile  =

> /home/lwhsu/ports/devel/py-ll-core/Makefile
> --- /usr/ports/devel/py-ll-core/Makefile	Fri Mar  2 12:14:07 2007
> +++ /home/lwhsu/ports/devel/py-ll-core/Makefile	Sat Mar 10 00:23:37 20=
07
> @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
>  #
> PORTNAME=3D	ll-core
> -PORTVERSION=3D	1.7.3
> +PORTVERSION=3D	1.7.5
>  CATEGORIES=3D	devel python
>  MASTER_SITES=3D	http://ftp.livinglogic.de/core/
>  PKGNAMEPREFIX=3D	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
